name: Key-Value Store
description: A generic key-value store: retrieve, store, and delete opaque values by opaque key. The key and value are opaque to this interface — it prescribes no key derivation and no value schema. Callers (such as a binding invoker's runtime resolving CONTEXT_REQUIRED challenges) choose keys and value shapes by their own conventions; this contract only standardizes get/set/delete so independent stores are interchangeable.

Value.description: An opaque stored value. This interface prescribes no schema for it; callers agree on its shape out of band.

openbindings.kv-store.get.description: Retrieve the value stored under a key. Returns null when no entry exists for the key.

key.description: The store key. Opaque to this interface.

output.description: The stored value, or null when no entry exists for the key.

openbindings.kv-store.set.description: Store a value under a key, replacing any existing value for that key in full.

key.description: The store key. Opaque to this interface.

openbindings.kv-store.delete.description: Remove the entry stored under a key. Idempotent: deleting a key with no entry succeeds.

key.description: The store key. Opaque to this interface.
